General.Name: SAB Biotherapeutics Inc
General.Description: SAB Biotherapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the development of human polyclonal immunotherapeutic antibodies to address immune system disorders and infectious diseases in the United States. Its lead product candidate is SAB-142, a potentially disease-modifying and redosable immunotherapy in clinical development for the treatment of autoimmune type 1 diabetes in Phase 2b clinical trials. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Miami Beach, Florida.
General.Address: 777 W 41st St., Miami Beach, FL, United States, 33140
